description: Deprecated compatibility alias for session_delete. Terminate daemon owned sessions selected by selector. Defaults to SIGTERM with a five second grace period.

grace_secs.description: Seconds to wait before SIGKILL. Defaults to 5.

selector.description:
Session selector used for matching sessions to terminate.

Grammar:
  all
  <uuid>
  id:<uuid>
  role:<name>
  namespace:<slug>
  dir:<path>
  label:<key>=<value>
  label:<key> in (v1, v2)
Examples:
  all
  019e44f9-...
  role:engineer
  namespace:default
  dir:/tmp/project
  label:app=nginx
  "label:app in (web, api)"

signal.description: Signal to send. Defaults to SIGTERM.

name: agent_delete
